item.title: Your Research Title Here
item.description: Introduction what is the problem you’re investigating and why does it matter. Methodology how did you approach this. what tools, methods, sources did you use. Findings what did you find. be specific and clear. Conclusion what does this mean. what are the implications. References Author, Title, Year, Link Author, Title, Year, Link

item.title: About
item.description: callsign: Abhishek Kumar student. developer. competitive programmer. building things, breaking things, learning along the way. currently flying with: linux + vim + i3wm c++ for competitive programming python for everything else markdown for notes and thoughts this site is my corner of the internet — thoughts, projects, and whatever else i feel like sharing.

item.title: First Flight
item.description: every journey starts somewhere. this is mine.

item.title: Projects
item.description: notes site my personal knowledge base, written in markdown and hosted online. visit → this site personal blog and portfolio. visit →
